subtitle.zh: 我们不是选股，而是把 AI 基建拆成一条有分工的价值链。
subtitle.en: We are not picking stocks; we are decomposing AI infrastructure into a value chain with distinct jobs.

mapIntro.zh: 每个层级回答一个不同的问题：需求在哪里出现、瓶颈在哪里形成、哪篇报告负责验证或证伪这条链。
mapIntro.en: Each layer answers a different question: where demand appears, where bottlenecks form, and which report validates or falsifies the chain.

otherIntro.zh: 这些报告暂不承担 AI 基建链条验证角色，保留在完整研究覆盖中。
otherIntro.en: These reports do not currently carry an AI-infrastructure chain-validation role, but remain part of the broader research coverage.

disclaimer.zh: 免责声明：本页仅用于研究框架展示和信息交流，不构成任何投资建议，请自行完成尽职调查。
disclaimer.en: Disclaimer: This page is for research-framework display and information exchange only. It does not constitute investment advice. Please conduct your own due diligence.

description.zh: 未来用于承接 TSM 等制造层验证；当前配置保留，但页面隐藏空层。
description.en: Reserved for manufacturing-layer checks such as TSM. Kept in the config now, hidden on the page while empty.

description.zh: GPU、加速卡和系统平台，是 AI 资本开支叙事的收入与利润核心。
description.en: GPUs, accelerators, and system platforms - the revenue and profit core of the AI capex narrative.

description.zh: ASIC、XPU 与 merchant silicon，用来检验 hyperscaler 自研和开放生态对通用 GPU 的替代强度。
description.en: ASICs, XPUs, and merchant silicon that test hyperscaler in-house silicon and open-ecosystem substitution against general GPUs.

description.zh: HBM、NAND 与数据中心 SSD，负责验证 AI 工作负载是否真的转化为位元、带宽和周期利润。
description.en: HBM, NAND, and data-center SSDs validate whether AI workloads convert into bits, bandwidth, and cycle profits.

description.zh: 以太网、交换系统和网络软件，校验 AI 集群架构路线，而不只是算力芯片出货。
description.en: Ethernet, switching systems, and network software validate AI cluster architecture, not just accelerator shipments.

description.zh: 有源光模块、光纤、光缆和被动连接材料，观察 AI 集群扩容是否穿透到物理连接层。
description.en: Active modules, fiber, cable, and passive connectivity materials show whether AI cluster expansion reaches the physical link layer.

description.zh: 燃气轮机、电网、燃料电池、核能、电力设备和储能，是 AI 数据中心最硬的外部约束。
description.en: Gas turbines, grid equipment, fuel cells, nuclear, electrical equipment, and storage are the hard external constraints for AI data centers.

description.zh: 电力管理、UPS、热管理与液冷，是建设速度和机柜功率密度最实时的仪表盘。
description.en: Power management, UPS, thermal management, and liquid cooling form the real-time dashboard for buildout speed and rack density.

description.zh: 铜、钨等关键资源层，用于约束电网、设备、国防与制造链条的上游可得性。
description.en: Copper, tungsten, and other critical resources constrain upstream availability for grids, equipment, defense, and manufacturing.

description.zh: 用高杠杆 GPU 云和客户集中度检验需求是否真实，而不是由融资、循环交易和提前囤货放大。
description.en: Uses leveraged GPU cloud and customer concentration to test whether demand is real, rather than amplified by financing, circularity, and pre-stocking.

description.zh: 最实时地观察 AI 建设速度和订单质量。
description.en: Tracks AI buildout velocity and order quality in near real time.

description.zh: 若该报告被证伪，整条 AI 基建书都必须重新校准。
description.en: If this report is falsified, the whole AI-infra book must be recalibrated.

description.zh: 验证不同技术路线之间的真实采用强度。
description.en: Tests real adoption strength across competing architecture paths.

description.zh: 横跨多个层级的瓶颈或共同约束变量。
description.en: A bottleneck or shared constraint that cuts across multiple layers.

if.zh: 如果 GPU/ASIC 收入继续加速，但网络、光连接和设施订单没有同步确认
if.en: If GPU/ASIC revenue keeps accelerating but networking, optical, and facility orders do not confirm it

then.zh: 则优先怀疑提前囤货、客户集中或节奏错配，而不是直接上调长期需求。
then.en: then first suspect pre-stocking, customer concentration, or timing mismatch before lifting long-term demand assumptions.

if.zh: 如果 Vertiv、GE Vernova 或 Bloom 的订单/积压开始降温
if.en: If orders or backlog at Vertiv, GE Vernova, or Bloom begin to cool

then.zh: 则 AI 数据中心建设速度可能低于芯片端叙事，需要下调交付节奏。
then.en: then AI data-center buildout speed may lag the chip-side narrative, and delivery cadence should be marked down.

if.zh: 如果 Broadcom 的自定义硅与 Arista 的开放以太网生态同时变强
if.en: If Broadcom custom silicon and Arista's open Ethernet ecosystem strengthen together

then.zh: 则 NVIDIA 一体化栈的增速和利润率需要接受更严格的架构压力测试。
then.en: then NVIDIA's integrated-stack growth and margin assumptions need a stricter architecture stress test.

if.zh: 如果 HBM/NAND 利润率达到周期高位，但终端 AI 需求确认不足
if.en: If HBM/NAND margins hit cyclical highs without enough end-demand confirmation

then.zh: 则内存与存储报告应从供给短缺切换到周期均值回归风险。
then.en: then memory and storage coverage should pivot from shortage upside to cyclical mean-reversion risk.

if.zh: 如果 CoreWeave 的 backlog、资本开支、租赁和融资成本同时恶化
if.en: If CoreWeave's backlog, capex, leases, and financing cost deteriorate together

then.zh: 则整本 AI 基建书要提高对循环融资和真实需求不足的权重。
then.en: then the whole AI-infra book should raise the weight on circular financing and insufficient real demand.

if.zh: 如果铜、钨、电网设备或本地电力约束继续收紧
if.en: If copper, tungsten, grid equipment, or local power constraints keep tightening

then.zh: 则数据中心扩张上限可能先被资源和施工约束决定，而不是由芯片供给决定。
then.en: then data-center expansion may be capped first by resources and construction constraints, not chip supply.

body.zh: 每篇报告先说明它在 AI 基建链条中的位置，再讨论公司质量、估值和风险。
body.en: Each report first states where it sits in the AI-infra chain, then discusses company quality, valuation, and risk.

body.zh: 完整报告围绕摘要、业务、行业竞争、财务健康、管理层、bull/bear、关键不确定性、估值、催化剂、结论、复盘和来源展开。
body.en: Full reports cover summary, business, industry and competition, financial health, management, bull/bear, key uncertainties, valuation, catalysts, conclusion, review, and sources.

title.zh: 3. Bull 与 bear 都要钢人化
title.en: 3. Steelman both bull and bear cases

body.zh: 强观点必须能说明自己错在哪里；看多与看空都要给出能被数据推翻的版本。
body.en: A strong view must explain how it could be wrong; both bull and bear cases need versions that data can overturn.

body.zh: 财报、10-K/10-Q、8-K、电话会、投资者材料和公司公告优先，媒体与卖方只作补充线索。
body.en: Earnings releases, 10-K/10-Q, 8-K, calls, investor materials, and company announcements come first; media and sell-side work are secondary leads.

body.zh: 价格、市值、倍数、backlog、订单和利润率都要说明时间点与口径，避免把快照写成永恒事实。
body.en: Price, market cap, multiples, backlog, orders, and margins need dates and definitions so snapshots do not read like permanent facts.

body.zh: 估值用于判断容错率、预期和情景位置，不发布目标价，也不把研究页写成交易建议。
body.en: Valuation frames margin of error, expectations, and scenario position. It does not produce target prices or turn the page into trading advice.

title.zh: 7. 角色不是标签，是验证任务

body.zh: 仪表盘、风险锚、架构校验和公共约束代表报告在整条链中的工作，而不是营销分类。
body.en: Dashboard, risk anchor, architecture check, and common constraint describe what a report does for the chain, not a marketing category.

body.zh: 一个公司报表变强不等于全链条变强，必须看上下游是否给出同方向证据。
body.en: One stronger company print does not prove the whole chain; upstream and downstream evidence must point the same way.

body.zh: 风险锚不是为了悲观，而是为了在需求、杠杆和循环交易出问题时及时重估整本书。
body.en: A risk anchor is not pessimism for its own sake; it forces a book-wide rethink when demand, leverage, or circularity breaks.

body.zh: 中英文版本要同步结构、关键数字、判断和风险，不允许一个语言版本保留旧观点。
body.en: Chinese and English versions must stay synced in structure, key numbers, judgments, and risks; no language version should preserve stale views.

body.zh: 重跑、增量更新和归档版本要能追踪观点如何变化，而不是静默覆盖旧判断。
body.en: Reruns, incremental updates, and archived versions should show how views changed rather than silently overwrite old judgments.

body.zh: 每个结论都要能回到监控清单和下一次验证节点，方便后续复盘而不是只留下态度。
body.en: Every conclusion should point back to a monitoring checklist and next verification node, leaving a review trail rather than just an opinion.
